zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Villiers IV於1323年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Geoffrey de Villiers23歲，母親Alice Brookesby  II x19歲。他於1352年與Joan Pakenham在英國萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Villiers IV于1323年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Villiers23岁，母亲Alice Brookesby  II x19岁。他于1352年与Joan Pakenham在英国萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Villiers IV was born in 1323, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey de Villiers, was 23 and his mother, Alice Brookesby  II x, was 19. He married Joan Pakenham in 1352, in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1392, in Brooksby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Villiers IV est né en 1323, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Villiers, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Brookesby  II x, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Pakenham en 1352, à Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1392, à Brooksby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Villiers IV 1323 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Villiers 23 und seine Mutter Alice Brookesby  II x 19. Er hat 1352 in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England Joan Pakenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Brooksby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Villiers IV è nato il nel 1323 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Villiers, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Brookesby  II x, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Pakenham nel 1352, nel Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1392, nel Brooksby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Villiers IVが1323年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Villiersは23歳，母Alice Brookesby  II xは19歳であった。1352年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルクビー マロリーでJoan Pakenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルークスビーで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Villiers IV(이)가 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Villiers(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Brookesby  II x(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1352년 영국 레이스스터실르 커k비 맬로리에서 Joan Pakenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 브룩스비에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Villiers IV nasceu em 1323, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey de Villiers, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Brookesby  II x, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Pakenham em 1352, em Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1392, em Brooksby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Villiers IV родился в 1323 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Villiers было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Brookesby  II x, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Pakenham в 1352 г. в местности киркби маллори, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности бруксби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Villiers IV nació en 1323, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey de Villiers, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Brookesby  II x, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan Pakenham en 1352, en Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1392, en Brooksby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
